$schema: Meme Sweeper — V8.0 Image Deck Rotation
description: Card image rotation from Figma Make ai_chat.json design brief (messages 133, 140, 151). 3 normal conspiracy memes → glitch_1 (CCTV trap) → glitch_2 (crash trigger).

deck.caption: SCOTTISH SURVEILLANCE SATELLITE CONFIRMS: NESSIE IS REAL
CLASSIFIED: EISENHOWER'S SECRET PACT WITH THE LIZARD PEOPLE
ROSWELL FILE #7: THE AUTOPSY THEY SAID NEVER HAPPENED
IS THIS ALL JUST A SIMULATION LOLOLOL

game_rules.normal_phase: Cards 1–3. Any swipe (left/right) = CORRECT. Score increments. Smooth card fly-off animation.
game_rules.glitch_phase: Card 4. Any swipe triggers full-phone SystemCrash overlay. 2.5s animation → close app → return to Kūmara OS home screen.
game_rules.last_revision_from_figma: glitch_1 (CCTV Rob Bot) stripped. Flow: 3 normals → immediate glitch_2 crash.
